response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hands-on work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), MongoDB/AWS experience, and a clear TDD/craftsmanship orientation with teaching and conference talks.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role (re:cinq), matching a key requirement
15+ years full-stack across TypeScript/Node/React with MongoDB and AWS CDK at Optilyz
Strong engineering craft: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Vitest not explicitly mentioned (Jest/testing background present but framework unstated)
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms, ~2016-2018) rather than recent backend services

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TS/Node/React depth with 15+ years experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in primary/secondary stack
